message:
fix(mobile): orbit dialog z-index behind sidebar + learn dropdown truncation

- StandaloneOrbitDialog: z-50 → z-[500] so it renders above the
  AI Missions sidebar (z-modal=400). Previously the orbit config
  modal opened behind the sidebar and was invisible.

- LearnDropdown: added max-w-[calc(100vw-1rem)] so the dropdown
  doesn't overflow the left edge on mobile viewports.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
